## Validation

- [ ] Tests were written or updated first for changed behavior.
- [ ] `make verify` passes.
- [ ] Provider API mutations have exact request/response tests.
- [ ] Documentation, examples, Helm values, and schema are updated where relevant.
- [ ] No credentials, PII, kubeconfigs, or generated artifacts are included.
